name: Carnado Stunt Car
author: Poki
description: Carnado Stunt Car is an open-world driving and racing game where the city is your ultimate stunt playground! Explore massive maps packed with ramps, bridges, secret spots, ports, and wild stunt tracks. Drift through traffic, complete hidden missions, collect awesome cars, and push your driving skills to the limit in exciting modes. With realistic driving physics and multiplayer action, Carnado Stunt Car delivers non-stop thrills and epic stunts, solo or with friends. Ready to burn rubber and take flight? How to play Carnado Stunt Car? Speed Up: W or the up arrow key Brake: S or the down arrow key Turn: A/D or the left/right arrow key Jump: the space bar Pause: ESC Reset: R Camera: C Who created Carnado Stunt Car? Carnado Stunt Car is created by Kage Vision. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Carnado Stunt Car for free? You can play Carnado Stunt Car for free on Poki. Can I play Carnado Stunt Car on mobile devices and desktop? Carnado Stunt Car can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets. Can I play Carnado Stunt Car with my friend? Yes! Carnado Stunt Car is a single or local multiplayer game so you can play with your friend at the same computer!
